inactive_activation_rehearsal_checklist_.offline_probe: Confirm the offline address draft probe remains planned and cites placeholder evidence.
inactive_activation_rehearsal_checklist_.agent_api_smoke_check: Replay the synthetic agent API missing-information response without network calls.
inactive_activation_rehearsal_checklist_.action_journal_redaction_check: Verify journal output contains only placeholder identifiers and no private values.
inactive_activation_rehearsal_checklist_.stale_source_hold_check: Hold the agent response when placeholder source freshness is stale.
inactive_activation_rehearsal_checklist_.reviewer_escalation_route: Route stale or conflicting placeholder evidence to ppd-reviewer-placeholder.
inactive_activation_rehearsal_checklist_.rollback_trigger_threshold: Rollback rehearsal is required after one failed offline probe for this checklist row.

inactive_activation_rehearsal_checklist_.offline_probe: Confirm the offline upload gate probe blocks consequential action placeholders.
inactive_activation_rehearsal_checklist_.agent_api_smoke_check: Replay the synthetic agent API upload-gate refusal response without network calls.
inactive_activation_rehearsal_checklist_.action_journal_redaction_check: Verify journal output omits private upload values and local paths.
inactive_activation_rehearsal_checklist_.stale_source_hold_check: Hold the agent response when upload guidance placeholder evidence is stale.
inactive_activation_rehearsal_checklist_.rollback_trigger_threshold: Rollback rehearsal is required after one failed redaction or stale-source hold check.
